content:
# elizaos/docs Monthly Report (May 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for May 2026 centered on strengthening the security posture of the ElizaOS ecosystem through documentation updates. The primary focus was the integration of token safety features into the DeFi plugin registry, ensuring that developers have clear guidance on implementing secure agent interactions. This effort reflects the project's ongoing commitment to providing robust, modular documentation for Web3-integrated AI agents.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### DeFi Plugin Registry Expansion
The primary technical focus for the month was the enhancement of the DeFi plugin registry documentation. 
*   **Token Safety Integration:** Documentation was initiated to incorporate `SafeAgent` protocols, providing developers with the necessary framework to implement enhanced token safety features within their DeFi plugins. This work is captured in [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84), which remains open and under review.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there are currently no active issues tracked for the repository. The project remains focused on the completion of the documentation updates initiated in PR [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84).

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration during May 2026 was focused on the refinement of the DeFi plugin registry. The primary activity involved the submission of PR [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84), which is currently awaiting review. There were no other documented community interactions or external contributions recorded for this repository during this timeframe.
